title: Fever in Children
description: Parent guide to fever in children, home care, warning signs, and when to seek urgent medical help.
keywords: fever, child fever, high temperature, red flags, paediatric fever, parent guide
references: RCH Australia Kids Health Info: Fever in children; American Academy of Pediatrics / HealthyChildren.org: Fever and your child; NICE NG143: Fever in under 5s; WHO IMCI danger signs.
